visual_rule: Metal attacks read as a forged-steel collision: a bright silver-white impact core, brushed gunmetal plates, sharp shard edges, and a few hot orange sparks. Keep the effect compact, premium, and never beam-like.

variants.description: Shared battle impact package for metal attacks.

assets.notes: Primary hit bloom and the dominant battle read.
Support layer for fractured steel plates and shard accents.
Hot spark residue and ember cleanup layer.
Low-alpha metallic dust and fade residue.

usage_notes: Use the impact bloom as the dominant subject.
Keep the shared style compact and forged-steel in feel.
Disable travel and beam language for the fallback package.
Prefer clean anchors and tight compositing over wide-screen effects.
